name: todo-app
description: Personal todo app — single-user, server-backed via Express + PostgreSQL, future-auth-ready seam.

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter client dev & pnpm --filter server dev
scripts.build: pnpm --filter client build && pnpm --filter server build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter client test && pnpm --filter server test && pnpm --filter @todo-app/shared test
